action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline test worst_region_accuracy = 0.4497 (Africa). Val was 0.5753 but test 0.4497, showing large generalization gap. Africa is the weakest region by far. Analysis: Need (1) more epochs (model still improving at ep5), (2) EMA for better generalization, (3) mixup for regularization, (4) cap region weights at 10x to prevent instability from 22x Africa weight, (5) TTA at test time for accuracy boost. Decision: Train 20 epochs with EMA+mixup+capped weights, add multi-scale+flip TTA in predict.py, submit eval after training.
